'''sopataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:buccomesial|buccomesial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:buccomesial|buccomesial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sopataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sopatithi|sopatithi]] || [[word:sopatiji|sopatiji]] || [[word:sopatishi|sopatishi]] || [[word:sopatiki|sopatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sopatuthuthu|sopatuthuthu]] || [[word:sopatujuju|sopatujuju]] || [[word:sopatushushu|sopatushushu]] || [[word:sopatukuku|sopatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sopatuthu|sopatuthu]] || [[word:sopatuju|sopatuju]] || [[word:sopatushu|sopatushu]] || [[word:sopatuku|sopatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sopatufthuf|sopatufthuf]] || [[word:sopatufjuf|sopatufjuf]] || [[word:sopatufshuf|sopatufshuf]] || [[word:sopatufkuf|sopatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sopatethe|sopatethe]] || [[word:sopateje|sopateje]] || [[word:sopateshe|sopateshe]] || [[word:sopateke|sopateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sopatothotho|sopatothotho]] || [[word:sopatojojo|sopatojojo]] || [[word:sopatoshosho|sopatoshosho]] || [[word:sopatokoko|sopatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sopatotho|sopatotho]] || [[word:sopatojo|sopatojo]] || [[word:sopatosho|sopatosho]] || [[word:sopatoko|sopatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sopatofthof|sopatofthof]] || [[word:sopatofjof|sopatofjof]] || [[word:sopatofshof|sopatofshof]] || [[word:sopatofkof|sopatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfthĂŻf|sopatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfjĂŻf|sopatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfshĂŻf|sopatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfkĂŻf|sopatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|sopatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|sopatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|sopatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|sopatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfthĂŻf|sopatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfjĂŻf|sopatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfshĂŻf|sopatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfkĂŻf|sopatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfthĂŻf|sopatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfjĂŻf|sopatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfshĂŻf|sopatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sopatĂŻfkĂŻf|sopatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sopatĂŠthĂŠ|sopatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sopatĂŠjĂŠ|sopatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sopatĂŠshĂŠ|sopatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sopatĂŠkĂŠ|sopatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sopatathatha|sopatathatha]] || [[word:sopatajaja|sopatajaja]] || [[word:sopatashasha|sopatashasha]] || [[word:sopatakaka|sopatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sopatatha|sopatatha]] || [[word:sopataja|sopataja]] || [[word:sopatasha|sopatasha]] || [[word:sopataka|sopataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sopatafthaf|sopatafthaf]] || [[word:sopatafjaf|sopatafjaf]] || [[word:sopatafshaf|sopatafshaf]] || [[word:sopatafkaf|sopatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sopatasha|sopatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sopatshĂ«sha|sopatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sopatrosha|sopatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sopatmusha|sopatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sopatyasha|sopatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosopatnkshĂ«sha|gosopatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosopatnkrosha|gosopatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosopatnkmusha|gosopatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosopatnkyasha|gosopatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sopapatasha|sopapatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sopapatshĂ«sha|sopapatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sopapatrosha|sopapatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sopapatmusha|sopapatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sopapatyasha|sopapatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosopapatnkshĂ«sha|gosopapatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosopapatnkrosha|gosopapatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosopapatnkmusha|gosopapatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosopapatnkyasha|gosopapatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sepĂŠtasha|sepĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sepĂŠtshĂ«sha|sepĂŠtshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sepĂŠtrosha|sepĂŠtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sepĂŠtmusha|sepĂŠtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sepĂŠtyasha|sepĂŠtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosepĂŠtnkshĂ«sha|gosepĂŠtnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosepĂŠtnkrosha|gosepĂŠtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosepĂŠtnkmusha|gosepĂŠtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosepĂŠtnkyasha|gosepĂŠtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sopfatasha|sopfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sopfatshĂ«sha|sopfatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sopfatrosha|sopfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sopfatmusha|sopfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sopfatyasha|sopfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosopfatnkshĂ«sha|gosopfatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosopfatnkrosha|gosopfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosopfatnkmusha|gosopfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosopfatnkyasha|gosopfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
